summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Tasks CRUD API, Organization Settings with currency selection, and Dropdown z-index fix. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features working correctly including Tasks page with payment tracking, Settings page with currency configuration, and fixed dropdown positioning.
passed_tests: Backend: Login returns valid token
Backend: GET /api/tasks - Returns paginated list with items, total, page, total_pages
Backend: POST /api/tasks - Creates task with title, priority, payment status
Backend: POST /api/tasks - Creates task with payment tracking (amount, paid_amount)
Backend: PUT /api/tasks/{id} - Updates task status and priority
Backend: DELETE /api/tasks/{id} - Deletes task successfully
Backend: GET /api/tasks?status=pending - Filter by status works
Backend: GET /api/tasks?payment_status=unpaid - Filter by payment status works
Backend: /api/tasks requires auth (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/organization-settings - Returns currency and settings
Backend: PUT /api/organization-settings - Updates currency (MYR/RM then USD/$)
Backend: /api/organization-settings requires auth (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/currencies - Returns 16 currencies (USD, MYR, EUR, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/leads - Leads API works for dropdown testing
Backend: GET /api/clients - Clients API works for dropdown testing
Backend: GET /api/contacts - Customers API works for dropdown testing
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user permissions for navigation
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Tasks navigation link visible in sidebar
Frontend: Tasks page loads with stats (Total Tasks, Pending, Total Payable, Total Paid)
Frontend: Tasks table shows tasks with priority badges, status, payment info
Frontend: Create Task modal opens with all fields (title, description, related lead/client, assigned to, due date, priority, payment details)
Frontend: Settings page loads with profile, appearance, currency settings, Google Calendar integration
Frontend: Currency select shows 'USD' with example '$1,000.00'
Frontend: Save Settings button visible
Frontend: Dark mode switch works
Frontend: Leads page dropdown z-index fix working (z-index: 70, fixed positioning)
Frontend: Dropdown menu items visible above table content
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed tasks during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: Tasks CRUD API with payment tracking at /api/tasks, Organization Settings with currency configuration at /api/organization-settings, Currencies list at /api/currencies. Dropdown z-index fix verified using ActionDropdown component with fixed positioning (z-index: 70). Frontend pages: /tasks shows tasks with payment status, /settings shows currency selection and Google Calendar integration setup. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_tasks_settings.py

mocked_features.GOOGLE_CALENDAR: Google Calendar integration is set up but not connected - requires user OAuth credentials to complete connection

features_verified.tasks_crud_api: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE endpoints working with payment tracking
features_verified.tasks_filters: Filter by status and payment_status working
features_verified.tasks_page_ui: Stats cards, task table, create/edit modal, dropdown actions
features_verified.organization_settings_api: GET and PUT endpoints working for currency
features_verified.currency_settings: Multi-currency support with USD, MYR, EUR, GBP, etc.
features_verified.settings_page_ui: Profile, Appearance, Currency, Google Calendar Integration sections
features_verified.dropdown_zindex_fix: ActionDropdown component uses fixed positioning with z-index: 70, visible above table content on Leads, Tasks, Clients, Customers pages
